name: NIST AI RMF: GOVERN — Legal Requirements Mapped
description: Applicable legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood and managed.
rationale: NIST AI RMF GOVERN 1.1: legal and regulatory requirements involving AI are understood, managed, and documented.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
